name: @summon/coding-agent
description: Summon — a branded agent harness: a coding agent with a built-in specialised-sub-agent delegation harness (spawn_agent) and the summon neon TUI.

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/modes/interactive/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/core/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/core/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/core/export-html/vendor/ && shx mkdir -p dist/builtin/harness && shx cp -r src/builtin/harness/agents dist/builtin/harness/ && shx cp -r src/builtin/harness/teams dist/builtin/harness/ && shx cp -r src/builtin/harness/blueprints dist/builtin/harness/
scripts.test: vitest --run && npm run test:harness && npm run bench
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run shrinkwrap

author: Mario Zechner
